case_title: URBAN ANDREW KARL VS FIRE DEPT.CITY & COUNTY OF SF.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF URBAN ANDREW KARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FIRE DEPT.CITY & COUNTY OF SF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-16-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JAN-12-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,480.00 FILED BY URBAN ANDREW KARL AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE DEPT.CITY & COUNTY OF SF. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FIRE DEPT.CITY & COUNTY OF SF.
NOT. OF JUDGMENT TO FIRE DEPT. RETURNED.
